Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar as scheduled for Default Prove-up Hearing this date.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan; Court Reporter: Rhonda Fung; Clerk: Anna Redigonda
Plaintiff represented by counsel: Douglas Alan Hollowing, Esq. appearing
Appearance of witness waived.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Michael Brockert; Brockert Trucking LLC; Brockert Enterprises, Inc. as follows:
Damages/Principal: $72,945.54.
Interest: $1,499.25.
Costs: $425.00.
Judgment signed in Open Court.
